title: Threat Hunt — Active Campaign Monitoring
description: PEAK hunt single-pane view: authentication attacks, C2/malware delivery, endpoint execution, persistence, and staging/exfil indicators. Use filters and row drilldowns to pivot into Search.

options.query: | tstats count WHERE index=threat_gen by host | sort host | eval label=host | eval value=host | fields label, value

index=threat_gen (EventCode=4625 OR "Failed password" OR "%ASA-4-106023" OR dnsupdate.info OR bloopencil.net OR xcit76.com OR xtibh.com OR "185.196.10.38" OR "185.196.10.247" OR "212.11.64.105" OR "104.238.222.60" OR "79.137.202.91") | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count

index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | rex field=Message "New Logon:[\s\S]+?Account Name:[^A-Za-z]+(?<user>[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]+)" | search user IN (sysadmin,itadmin,netops,gwhite,jsmith,jdoe,abrown,cjohnson,dlee,egarcia,fmartinez,hthompson,mwilson) | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats dc(user) as compromised_accounts

index=threat_gen (host=WS-DEV01* OR host=WS-DEV02* OR host=WS-DEV03* OR ComputerName=WS-DEV01* OR ComputerName=WS-DEV02* OR ComputerName=WS-DEV03*) | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats dc(coalesce(ComputerName,host)) as hosts

index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4624) | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:[^0-9]+(?<src_ip>[0-9\.]+)" | rex field=Message "Account For Which Logon Failed:[\s\S]+?Account Name:[^A-Za-z]+(?<fail_user>[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.\$]+)" | rex field=Message "New Logon:[\s\S]+?Account Name:[^A-Za-z]+(?<succ_user>[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.\$]+)" | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | eval outcome=if(EventCode=4624,"success","fail") | stats count(eval(outcome="fail")) as failures, count(eval(outcome="success")) as successes by src_ip | where failures+successes >= 5 | sort - failures - successes | head 20

index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | rex "Failed password for (invalid user )?(?<user>[^\s]+) from (?<src_ip>[\d\.]+)" | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count as failures, dc(user) as users_tried, values(user) as users by src_ip | where failures > 30 | sort -failures

index=threat_gen sourcetype="stream:http" (bloopencil.net OR xcit76.com OR xtibh.com OR "185.196.10" OR "104.238.222.60" OR "79.137.202.91") | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | rex "\"http_user_agent\":\"(?<ua>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"site\":\"(?<site>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"uri_path\":\"(?<uri>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"src_ip\":\"(?<src>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"dest_ip\":\"(?<dst>[^\"]+)\"" | stats count, values(ua) as agents, values(uri) as uris by src, dst, site | sort -count

index=threat_gen sourcetype="stream:dns" | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | spath path=query{} output=qname | eval qlen=len(qname) | where qlen > 40 AND match(qname, "[a-z0-9]{20,}\.") | stats count, max(qlen) as maxlen, values(src_ip) as src_ips, values(query_type{}) as qtypes by qname | sort -count | head 25

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" ("encodedcommand" OR "-enc " OR "FromBase64String" OR "DownloadString" OR "Invoke-Expression" OR " IEX ") | rex "EventID\":(?<eid>\d+)" | rex "\"Image\":\"(?<image>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"CommandLine\":\"(?<cmdline>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"Computer\":\"(?<host>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"User\":\"(?<user>[^\"]+)\"" | search eid=1 | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count, values(cmdline) as commands by host, user | sort -count | head 15

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" (AppData OR Temp OR ProgramData) | rex "EventID\":(?<eid>\d+)" | rex "\"Image\":\"(?<image>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"CommandLine\":\"(?<cmdline>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"Computer\":\"(?<host>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"User\":\"(?<user>[^\"]+)\"" | search eid=1 (image="*\\\\Temp\\*" OR image="*\\\\AppData\\*" OR image="*\\\\ProgramData\\*") | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count, values(image) as images, values(cmdline) as commands by host, user | sort -count | head 20

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" "CurrentVersion\\Run" | rex "\"Image\":\"(?<image>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"TargetObject\":\"(?<target>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"Computer\":\"(?<host>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"Details\":\"(?<details>[^\"]+)\"" | where NOT match(image, "MsMpEng|SecurityHealth|OneDrive|Teams") | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count, values(image) as images, values(target) as keys, values(details) as details by host | sort -count | head 20

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" ("7za.exe" OR "7z.exe" OR "winrar" OR "rar.exe") | rex "EventID\":(?<eid>\d+)" | rex "\"Image\":\"(?<image>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"CommandLine\":\"(?<cmdline>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"Computer\":\"(?<host>[^\"]+)\"" | rex "\"User\":\"(?<user>[^\"]+)\"" | search eid=1 | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")), __ts=trim(replace("$tok_src_ip|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,",")) OR ComputerName IN (split(__th,","))) | where (len(__ts)<1 OR __ts="*" OR (isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip IN (split(__ts,","))) OR (isnotnull(src) AND src IN (split(__ts,",")))) | stats count, values(cmdline) as commands by host, user | sort -count | head 20

index=threat_gen sourcetype="cisco:asa" ("185.196.10" OR "104.238.222.60" OR "212.11.64.105" OR "79.137.202.91") message_id=302013 | eval __th=trim(replace("$tok_host|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__th)<1 OR __th="*" OR host IN (split(__th,","))) | timechart span=1h count by message_id

options.markdown:
## Campaign overview
**KPIs** summarizing hunt indicators (respect time range and filters).

kpi_total.title: Total attack indicators
kpi_total.description: Matching hunt IOC strings and auth/ASA/DNS noise (30d window).

kpi_hosts.title: Hosts with suspicious activity
kpi_hosts.description: Distinct WS-DEV* endpoints with coalesced host name.

kpi_ext_ips.title: Tracked attacker IPs (campaign set)
kpi_ext_ips.description: Count of known-bad IPs in the hunt corpus (static list).

options.markdown:
## Authentication attacks
**Password spray** and **SSH brute force**.

## Command & control / malware delivery
**HTTP** and **DNS** tunneling patterns.

## Data staging & exfiltration
**Archive tooling** and **ASA** egress signals.

col_spray.title: Password spray — failures vs successes by source IP (top 20)
col_spray.description: Windows Security 4625/4624 with extracted source network address.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4624) earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:[^0-9]+(?<src_ip>[0-9\.]+)" | search src_ip=$row.src_ip.value|s$

tbl_ssh.title: SSH brute force — external IPs targeting common accounts
tbl_ssh.description: linux_secure failed password events; failures > 30. Click row to pivot.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search src_ip=$row.src_ip.value|s$

tbl_http.title: Suspicious outbound HTTP (top external URIs)
tbl_http.description: stream:http to hunt-related domains or IPs.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="stream:http" earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search src=$row.src.value|s$ dest=$row.dst.value|s$ site=$row.site.value|s$

tbl_dns.title: DNS tunneling — long random subdomains
tbl_dns.description: stream:dns queries with length > 40 and long label pattern.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="stream:dns" earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search qname=$row.qname.value|s$

tbl_ps.title: Encoded PowerShell executions by host/user
tbl_ps.description: Sysmon EID 1 with suspicious script indicators.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search host=$row.host.value|s$ user=$row.user.value|s$

tbl_bin.title: Suspicious binaries in user-writable paths
tbl_bin.description: Sysmon EID 1 under Temp, AppData, or ProgramData.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1 earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search host=$row.host.value|s$ user=$row.user.value|s$

tbl_run.title: Autorun / Run key persistence writes
tbl_run.description: Sysmon registry events excluding common security/IT noise.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" "CurrentVersion\\Run" earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search host=$row.host.value|s$

tbl_7z.title: 7-Zip / archive creation (possible ransomware or exfil)
tbl_7z.description: Sysmon process create for common archive utilities.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" ("7za.exe" OR "7z.exe" OR "winrar" OR "rar.exe") earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | search host=$row.host.value|s$ user=$row.user.value|s$

line_asa.title: Outbound connections to known-bad IPs (ASA teardown)
